title: Concatenate Files Executor Schema
description: Concatenate files with optional content extraction and transforms

sourceFiles.description: Ordered list of files or glob patterns to concatenate.

outputFile.description: Output file path relative to project root.

extractPattern.description: Regex pattern to extract content from each file. Uses capture group $1.

transforms.description: Regex find/replace transforms applied after concatenation.

normalizeLineEndings.description: Normalize to LF line endings (default: true)
